message:
Command `
# 212 min CPU / ~57 min elapsed. DRT running at ~3.7x parallelism
# Groups phase: large design may take several more hours
# Setting up long-running background monitor and doing a HUGE sleep
nohup bash -c '
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
STEP70_LOG="$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
MON_LOG="/tmp/drt_hourly.log"
while true; do
  TS=$(date)
  ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk "{print \$2}" | head -1)
  LOG_LINES=$(wc -l < "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null)
  LOG_MOD=$(stat -c%y "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null)
  VMRSS=$(cat /proc/${ORPID}/status 2>/dev/null | grep VmRSS | awk "{print \$2}")
  STATE=$(cat /proc/${ORPID}/status 2>/dev/null | grep "^State:" | awk "{print \$2}")
  CPU_TIME=$(ps -p ${ORPID} -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
  FINAL=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo FINAL || echo no)
  echo "[$TS] PID:$ORPID State:$STATE RSS:${VMRSS}kB CPUtime:$CPU_TIME LogLines:$LOG_LINES Final:$FINAL" >> "$MON_LOG"
  [ "$FINAL" = "FINAL" ] && break
  [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$TS] DIED" >> "$MON_LOG" && break
  sleep 3600
done
' > /dev/null 2>&1 &
echo "Monitor started: $!"

# Now do the actual long sleep - 12 hours
sleep 43200
echo "=== Woke after 12h: $(date) ==="
cat /tmp/drt_hourly.log | tail -20
` executed with exit code -1.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "
# 212 min CPU / ~57 min elapsed. DRT running at ~3.7x parallelism
# Groups phase: large design may take several more hours
# Setting up long-running background monitor and doing a HUGE sleep
nohup bash -c '
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
STEP70_LOG="$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
MON_LOG="/tmp/drt_hourly.log"
while true; do
  TS=$(date)
  ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk "{print \$2}" | head -1)
  LOG_LINES=$(wc -l < "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null)
  LOG_MOD=$(stat -c%y "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null)
  VMRSS=$(cat /proc/${ORPID}/status 2>/dev/null | grep VmRSS | awk "{print \$2}")
  STATE=$(cat /proc/${ORPID}/status 2>/dev/null | grep "^State:" | awk "{print \$2}")
  CPU_TIME=$(ps -p ${ORPID} -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
  FINAL=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo FINAL || echo no)
  echo "[$TS] PID:$ORPID State:$STATE RSS:${VMRSS}kB CPUtime:$CPU_TIME LogLines:$LOG_LINES Final:$FINAL" >> "$MON_LOG"
  [ "$FINAL" = "FINAL" ] && break
  [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$TS] DIED" >> "$MON_LOG" && break
  sleep 3600
done
' > /dev/null 2>&1 &
echo "Monitor started: $!"

# Now do the actual long sleep - 12 hours
sleep 43200
echo "=== Woke after 12h: $(date) ==="
cat /tmp/drt_hourly.log | tail -20
" timed out
